summary: Completed comprehensive testing of M4 HR/Payroll-lite feature. All backend APIs passing (20/20 tests). Frontend fully functional with all pages working correctly for Admin and Technician roles.

integration_issues.issue: When technician navigates to /payroll, the page renders but shows 'No payroll runs found' instead of access denied message. The API correctly returns 403, but frontend doesn't display user-friendly error.

passed_tests: GET /api/employees - Lists employees with profile info (Admin only)
POST /api/employees - Creates/updates employee profile with pay type and rate
Technician correctly blocked from /api/employees (403)
GET /api/advances - Lists advances with filters (status, user_id)
POST /api/advances - Creates advance/loan for employee
Technician can view own advances via /api/advances
GET /api/payroll-runs - Lists payroll runs (Admin only)
POST /api/payroll-runs - Creates draft payroll run for period
GET /api/payroll-runs/{id} - Gets run with embedded payslips
POST /api/payroll-runs/{id}/generate - Creates payslips for active employees
POST /api/payroll-runs/{id}/finalize - Locks payroll (status -> Finalized)
DELETE /api/payroll-runs/{id} - Deletes draft runs only
GET /api/payslips - Admin sees all, Technician sees only own
POST /api/payslips/{id}/set-deductions - Updates deductions (draft only)
POST /api/payslips/{id}/set-deductions blocked on finalized payroll
POST /api/payslips/{id}/mark-paid - Creates payment record (finalized only)
Cannot mark-paid on draft payroll (correctly blocked)
Daily payroll calculation: days_present * daily_rate verified
Hourly payroll calculation: hours from work reports * hourly_rate verified
GET /api/payroll-enums - Returns all payroll-related enums
Frontend: Employees page loads with 4 employees, edit dialog works
Frontend: Advances page with create dialog and filters
Frontend: Payroll Runs page with create dialog and row navigation
Frontend: Payroll Detail page with payslips table, generate/finalize buttons
Frontend: My Payslips page for technicians with detail dialog
Access control: Technician sidebar shows 'My Payslips', not 'Payroll'/'Employees'/'Advances'
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add error handling in PayrollRunsPage to show 'Access Denied' when API returns 403 instead of empty table
critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding role-based route protection in App.js for /payroll, /employees, /advances routes
DialogContent components are missing aria-describedby attributes (console warnings)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_ prefixed advances and payroll runs, cleanup at end. Existing data: tech1 has Daily pay @€120/day, tech2 has Hourly pay @€18.50/hr. Two advances exist for tech1. Four payroll runs exist (3 Finalized, 1 Draft).
context_for_next_testing_agent: M4 HR/Payroll-lite feature fully implemented and tested. Key flows: 1) Configure employee pay profiles (Hourly/Daily/Monthly), 2) Create advances/loans, 3) Create payroll run with period -> Generate payslips -> Finalize -> Mark individual payslips as paid. Pay calculations: Daily uses attendance count, Hourly uses work report hours, Monthly is fixed. Advances can be deducted from payslips and remaining_amount is updated when payslip is marked paid. Technicians can only view their own payslips via /my-payslips page.

test_classes: TestEmployeeProfiles - Employee listing and profile management
TestPayrollRuns - Payroll run CRUD, generate, finalize
TestPayslips - Payslip listing and access control
TestSetDeductions - Deductions editing on draft payroll only
TestMarkPaid - Payment recording on finalized payroll only

pages_tested: EmployeesPage - Employee list with profiles, edit dialog
AdvancesPage - Advances table with filters, create dialog
PayrollRunsPage - Payroll runs list with create dialog
MyPayslipsPage - Technician's payslip list with detail dialog

payroll_workflow: Generate payslips (creates payslips for active employee profiles)
Finalize payroll (locks all payslips, status -> Finalized)
Mark individual payslips as paid (only on Finalized status)
verified_business_rules.advance_deduction: When payslip is marked paid, advance.remaining_amount is reduced by deducted amount. If remaining_amount <= 0, advance status changes to 'Closed'
